message:
feat(cli,conformance): switch to TUI-integrated HTTP server and expand error code parity tests

- cli/lib.rs: change server entrypoint from run_http() to
  run_http_with_tui() integrating TUI display with the HTTP server
  for unified operational monitoring
- conformance/tests/error_code_parity.rs (+30 lines): expanded error
  code parity test coverage validating Rust error codes match Python
  reference across all tool error paths
- Cargo.lock: dependency resolution update
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker with completed work across
  search-core migration, TUI Mermaid visualization, and reservation
  parity improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
